Name: AfflictionsAndBuffs
Author: LittleWolfStorm
Description: Adds 4 new afflictions and 4 buffs!

Name: AfraidoftheDark
Author: EtherSystem
Description: Makes the player anxious at night.

Name: AlternativeParasitesAtMaxLvl
Author: BaltaZar
Description: Reintroduces Intestinal Parasites at Cooking level 5, with alternative, less harsh impact. Only impacts characters with cooking level 5.

Status.notes: Incremental mode and Fixed mode. Optional reminder to take dose when the real affliction kicks in. Check the Repo for more details!

Name: ExpandedAiFrameworkAmbushWolfMod
Author: MonsieurMeh
Description: Creates a new wolf spawn type that hides around the map, waiting for you to walk by...

Name: AnimalRespawnTimeMod
Author: BaltaZar
Description: This mod makes animals' respawn times adjustable in days through ModSettings.

Status.patchnotes: ModSettings implementation. Old Json file can be deleted.

Name: AnimalSounds
Author: LittleWolfStorm
Description: Mod allows you to howl like a wolf and more...

Name: AutoFillMaponExplore
Author: Pathoschild
Description:
Fills in the map around you as you explore, with a configurable range. Fully compatible with Map Manager.

See readme for more info.

Status.patchnotes: Internal changes to be more futureproof.

Name: BiggerTrappers
Author: BaltaZar
Description:
This mod expands Trapper's Cabin found in Mystery Lake to make it a little bigger in size.
Interior and exterior is modified along 1 axis (making it wider).

Status.notes: Some items may be floating in their original position. Tried to fix most stuff.

Name: BricklayersDoorFix
Author: MooseMeat
Description: Fix the door at Bricklayer's Retreat.

Name: CatchColdMod
Author: BaltaZar
Description: This mod adds a mechanic of catching a Cold affliction, developing a resistance or the cold worsens to Pneumonia.

Status.patchnotes:
- new icons
- when treating pneumonia, the damage will be less severe
- overall a little less harsh pneumonia
- fixed birch bark tea
- added coughing when afflicted pneumonia
- fix for cold risk not curing when fully depleted
Status.notes: Check the Repo for more details!

Name: ChooseStartingGearRedux
Author: MooseMeat
Description: REPLACES CHOOSE STARTING GEAR AND DLC-CHOOSE STARTING GEAR-DLC.  Select the items you would like to start the game with.

Name: ChooseStartingLocationTFTFT
Author: Ezinw
Description: Allows you to choose your starting location when starting a new Sandbox game. 300+ locations, all regions, all difficulty modes. Full instructions in the README.

Name: ClothingExpanded
Author: MooseMeat
Description: Adds a way to combine accessories with clothing to have even more accessories equipped at the same time

Name: CoastalConnection
Author: MooseMeat
Description: This mod connects Coastal Highway and Bleak Inlet by their shared road.

Name: ExpandedAiFrameworkCompanionWolfMod
Author: MonsieurMeh
Description: Creates a new wolf spawn type that can be tempted with meat and eventually tamed. This mod is still very early in development, it works well enough to get the pup following you and growing but there are no functional changes beyond burning a hole in your meat stash.

Name: CraftAnywhereRedux
Author: MooseMeat
Description: Allows you to adjust the crafting location for vanilla craftable items.

Name: CustomWhiteout
Author: MooseMeat
Description: A mod for the Long Dark letting you experience a custom whiteout challenge.

Name: DIYbySantana
Author: Atlas Lumi
Description: Adds craftable furniture.

Name: ExpandedAiFramework
Author: MonsieurMeh
Description: Provides framework needed for new spawn mechanics and AI behaviors.

Status.notes: BACK UP YOUR SAVES!
Status.issues: BETA. Unstable. It crashes. No corruption noted.

Name: ExportJournal
Author: MooseMeat
Description: A mod for The Long Dark (2.51+) which allows the player to export the journal data of the active save game.

Name: FastTravel
Author: Pathoschild
Description:
Lets you save any number of places, and fast travel to them anytime at the press of a button. Includes balance options. For example, you can have one home base while you explore the world, without the tedium of transferring your hoard to each region.

See readme and save safety for more info.

Status.patchnotes: Added new GUI to manage fast travel destinations. Added support for naming and reordering destinations. Added support for any number of destinations beyond 9. Fixed wrong region name shown on-screen when traveling across regions. The mod is no longer experimental.

Name: FatDestroyer
Author: Data-0
Description: Despawn any low condition fat around the world, so it doesn't just stay ruined outside your door forever.

Status.patchnotes: Updated for 2.51

Name: FeatSettings
Author: MonsieurMeh
Description: Exposes effect and unlock settings for feats. Allows unlocking of legacy feat, "Big Cat Killer". Eliminates startup noises for feats unlocked "the wrong way" via bugs or console command use. Allows customizable number of feats at any difficulty level.

Name: FortifiedLookouts
Author: MooseMeat
Description: Increase the size, add a second regular sized embedded lookout, and raise the windows for a clear view for the lookouts in Mystery Lake, Coastal Highway and Bleak Inlet.

Name: FriendlyInlet
Author: MooseMeat
Description: Make Bleak Inlet more friendly by redistributing wood spawns to the coast and reduce and relocate some wolf spawns.

Name: GearPerfectConditionMod
Author: BaltaZar
Description: Sets condition to 100 for specified looted Gear items. Customizable Json. Default items: Matches, Lamp fuel, Mag lens, Antiseptic, Insulated flasks

Status.notes: This mod is the successor of my former mod, ToolsFullConditionMod

Name: GreatBareIsland
Author: MooseMeat
Description: An alternate version of Great Bear Island that removes most cabins, trailers and generic houses or replaces them with ruins for a new challenge.

Name: HotkeyMod
Author: BaltaZar
Description: Simple hotkey mod. When equiping firearms, guns with the most bullets in the magazine will be equiped (If in the json list). When equiping torches, the one item with the LEAST codition comes up. The basic rule after the above rules: first item in the list is going to be equiped. Clothes and accessories are supported too, and there is a toggle function implemented, so first tap equips specified clothing item, second tap switches back the original item if there was any. Check the Repo for more details!

Status.patchnotes: Fixed an issue with ruined torches getting selected first.
Status.notes: Check the Repo for more details!

Name: HungerRevamped
Author: BaltaZar
Description: Improves the hunger system by separating hunger and stored calories. Adds customization options for various cooking such as enabling cooking ruined food.

Status.patchnotes:
Updated for current version.
Fixed Harvest Can.
Added a feature which gives you a recycled can when used one up in a cooking recipe.
Made debug logging off by default.
Status.notes: Check the Repo for more details!

Name: HuntBroadcast
Author: hzb1130
Description: Damage and kill info broadcast

Name: ImprovedFirstAidPanel
Author: EtherSystem
Description: Small QoL to improved the First Aid Panel, making the panel easier to use by adding body-area filtering and direct treatment buttons

Status.patchnotes: fix issues with intestinal parasites

Name: InfiniteFires
Author: MooseMeat
Description: It was always burning, since the world's been turning.

Name: MyPicturesMod
Author: MooseMeat
Description: Let's you decorate your base with pictures, and upload your own.

Name: InterloperHUDPro
Author: EtherSystem
Description: Adds a few new HUD displays.

Status.patchnotes: New display HUD for the active scene

Name: InventoryReassignments
Author: MooseMeat
Description: This is a mod for The Long Dark that allows players to reassign various gear items to different inventory categories.

Name: ItemPiles
Author: MooseMeat
Description: Adds blueprints for stacked items.

Name: ItemScanner
Author: hzb1130
Description: TLD MOD that scans nearby items, containers, and harvestable plants around the player and displays their locations on screen.

Name: LitharsRidge
Author: MooseMeat
Description: A hidden ridge in Bleak Inlet with a cozy hut, scenic overlooks, and a path for explorers to discover.

Name: MajorMiseries
Author: EtherSystem
Description: Adds 18 new major afflictions and 1 new buff.

Status.patchnotes: Aurora Influence woooo

Name: MapIconFix
Author: hzb1130
Description: Fixed the issue where the plant collection icon on the map would not disappear after gathering.

Name: MehToolBox
Author: MonsieurMeh
Description: A toolbox for modders to use in their mods.

Name: MinorMiseries
Author: EtherSystem
Description: Adds 14 new minor afflictions and 3 new buffs.

Status.patchnotes: Added StalkerAids&Supplements Support

Name: MiseryModePlus
Author: MooseMeat
Description: Mod for The Long Dark that adds more spawn locations in misery mode and adds a custom setting to enable misery afflictions for custom runs.  Formerly Additional Misery Spawns and Misery in Custom Games.

Name: MoreFuelAccelerant
Author: hzb1130
Description: Tinder, charcoal and fat as fuel. The accelerant is consumed more slowly.

Name: MotionTracker
Author: okclm
Description: Adds a minimap that can show animals, spraypaint markings, and select gear.

Status.patchnotes: TLD 2.5 / Unity 6 fix, Cougars added, Issue with Crows sometimes remaining on the radar fixed.

Name: NoCairns
Author: MooseMeat
Description: A mod that can disable all cairns.

Name: NoCameraSway
Author: LittleWolfStorm
Description: Camera will stop swaying

Status.patchnotes: Sway now has a speed and amplitude of 0.001 to prevent triggering a bob
Status.notes: Camera will sway in the background if you open the menu

Name: NoMoreCabinFever
Author: LittleWolfStorm
Description: Disables cabin fever

Name: NonLethalFlares
Author: MonsieurMeh
Description: Disables flaregun damage and bleeding. Option to enable or disable flare gun rounds sticking to wildlife.

Name: NotTheWolves
Author: MonsieurMeh
Description: Makes wolves invulnerable and prevents wolf carcasses from spawning ingame.

Name: OldSchoolHarvesting
Author: MonsieurMeh
Description: Mutes the sound, removes the animation and dims the lights during carcass harvesting with a progress bar, in honor of the old days.

Name: OxygenLevels
Author: EtherSystem
Description: Add a system to simulate oxygen deprivation based on the player's altitude.

Name: PZLoadingScreen
Author: EtherSystem
Description: Just a custom PZ-like custom loading screens mod

Name: PathfindersAscent
Author: MooseMeat
Description: An alternate version of Timberwolf Mountain, Blackrock, and Ash Canyon designed to offer a fresh and challenging experience for veteran survivors.

Name: PemmicanSlowerDecay
Author: BaltaZar
Description: Simple mod modifying the cooked Pemmican bar, lowering its decay rate to match cured meat's.

Status.notes: Works with GearInfo. Added a patch for Gear Decay Modifier mod by Romain to exclude Pemmican bars from that mod, because Pemmican is different than a rabbit pie!

Name: PhotoofaLovedOne
Author: MooseMeat
Description: This mod allows you to carry a customizable picture of something you care about.

Name: PlacingGeometrically
Author: hzb1130
Description:
A variant of Placing Anywhere that adds some functionality.
几何学放置。

Name: PredatorSpawnSelector
Author: MooseMeat
Description: Enable or disable predator spawns by region and select which type of wolves or bears for each region. ***This mod replaces both Remove Cougars and Timberwolves Anywhere***

Name: PrepperCache
Author: okclm
Description: Provides access to prepper cache information for the current game.

Status.patchnotes: TLD 2.5 / Unity 6 fix.

Name: PreserveContainerItems
Author: MooseMeat
Description: Gear items that are at 0% condition will no longer disappear from containers.  CAUTION: Has not been tested on every single type of container, so be careful.

Name: RandomizeInterloperRareSpawns
Author: MooseMeat
Description: About A mod for The Long Dark that randomizes Interloper loot.

Name: RavineBridgeFix
Author: MooseMeat
Description: Fix the bridge in the Ravine..

Name: RecipeRequirements
Author: Ezinw
Description: Allows the player to adjust the cooking skill level required to create specific recipes.

Name: RecordingUtils
Author: MooseMeat
Description: Mod for the Long Dark that adds better camera control for recording or streaming purposes.

Name: RenewableGunpowderMod
Author: BaltaZar
Description: Adds gunpowder materials: Dusting Sulfur, Stump Remover and Lead to loot pools via beachcombing and container loot tables. I made this mod before I realized AmmunitionCraftingTools mod by Sm4rtBoyTom made better job at making gunpowder renewable. Never mind, someone might use it.

Status.notes: Check the Repo for more details!

Name: ResumePreviewer
Author: EtherSystem
Description: Displays the SaveSlot that will be loaded before pressing Resume in the Main Menu.

Name: RetrieveBulletsMod
Author: BaltaZar
Description:
This mod makes bullets retrievable from animals you killed with firearms.
You can harvest new items, called "Damaged bullets" from the carcasses and then reforge them at the ammunition workshop.

Status.notes: Check the Repo for more details!

Name: RichPresence
Author: Atmudia
Description: Rich Presence for The Long Dark.

Name: SaveBackup
Author: Pathoschild
Description:
Automatically creates hourly and daily backups of your save files. Particularly when playing with mods, this lets you recover your save if something goes wrong.

See readme for more info.

Status.patchnotes: Added option to trigger a backup at any time.

Name: ScaledFishMod
Author: BaltaZar
Description: Have you ever wondered why fishes are the same size per type visually? Well, no more! Scaled Fish Mod makes fishes' model size dynamic based on their weight.

Name: SeasonedInterloping
Author: MooseMeat
Description: Mod for The Long Dark that adds Forsaken Airfield, ZOC, Sundered Pass and Bleak Inlet to the Interloper region list.

Name: ShootingRange
Author: MooseMeat
Description: Enable shooting range targets, weather vane, hunting blind, and a warm barn near Pensive Pond in Pleasant Valley.

Name: Shortcuts
Author: MooseMeat
Description: Adds a variety of shortcuts to some regions. You will need to reload the game for the changes to take effect.

Name: Shotgun
Author: Team Shotgun
Description: Heard y'all wanted a shotgun...

Name: ShowTraderTrust
Author: Pathoschild
Description:
Shows your current trust level with the trader when talking with him on the radio.

See readme for more info.

Status.patchnotes: Fixed performance impact for some players; internal changes to be more futureproof.

Name: TLDTools
Author: Tactical Ex
Description: Description: A simple tool to make backing up and restoring survival game saves for The Long Dark more convenient. Note: This is an external tool, not a mod and does not require a mod loader to use.

Status.patchnotes: Added optional mod-data configuration support for backing up and restoring with mods enabled

Name: SkillAdjustment
Author: Ezinw
Description: Allows the player to adjust the skill benefits for each level.

Name: SkyCoop
Author: Filigrani
Description: Multiplayer mod for the game

Status.issues: SkyCoop.modcomponent file is known to be corrupted
Status.notes: Current release of the mod only works on The Long Dark Version 2.02 or 2.01
Status.patchnotes: Current release of the mod only works on The Long Dark Version 2.02 or 2.01

Author: Filigrani

Name: SleepWithoutABed
Author: Ezinw
Description: Allows players to sleep without a bed or bedroll. Accessed through the Pass Time option in the radial menu.

Name: StolenMeatMod
Author: MonsieurMeh
Description: Meat outside gets stolen by predators, if not stored properly. If you leave a meat pile on your doorstep, you might attract a few unfriendly visitors too! Force you to stop building meat piles, or maybe use them to your advantage??

Status.notes: Check the Repo for more details!

Name: StoryModeCollectibles
Author: MooseMeat
Description: Adds collectible items from Wintermute into survival mode.

Name: StretchArmstrong
Author: TLD Modding Community
Description: Change the range at which you can interact with things.

Name: StrongFishingLine
Author: Data-0
Description: A small item that spawns around containers in the world. Usually found in fishing huts. It gives some fishing lines when broken down.

Status.patchnotes: Updated for 2.51

Name: TLDWolfskinScarf
Author: MooseMeat
Description: Adds a new craftable scarf made of wolf fur.

Name: TheLongMood
Author: EtherSystem
Description: Adds Project Zomboid–style Boredom & Depression to The Long Dark.

Status.patchnotes: Added StalkerAids&Supplements Support

Name: ExpandedAiFrameworkTrackingWolfMod
Author: MonsieurMeh
Description: Creates a new wolf spawn type that tracks you across the map, no matter your scent level. Watch your back!

Name: Trespasser
Author: MonsieurMeh
Description: Adds a new distinct difficulty mode between Stalker and Interloper. Start with 3 matches and a chance to find interloper-banned items around the world.

Name: ExpandedAiFrameworkWanderingWolfMod
Author: MonsieurMeh
Description: Creates a new wolf spawn type that wanders around the map instead of staying in a small area.

Name: WeatherDisplay
Author: hzb1130
Description: Displays current weather information on screen.

Name: WeightlessWoodworkingTools
Author: Data-0
Description: Makes the woodworking tools weight almost nothing. The player shouldn't be punished for wanting to decorate their home

Status.patchnotes: Updated for 2.51

Name: WildFire
Author: MooseMeat
Description: This is a mod for The Long Dark that add color, smoke and sparks customization for fires, along with 6 new gear items and makes several vanilla items burnable.
